pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking i heard him move in the other room, but then i remember. everything just feels so empty. like i'm just going through the motions of a life that isn't even mine anymore. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed.

pool.baseline: everything just feels so pointless lately. like, i was looking at the stars tonight and it just hit me how much of a joke it all is. we spend our whole lives struggling, working, hurting, just to have it all erased by entropy anyway. in a billion years, none of this even happened. why even bother trying to keep going?

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i'm still logging on. everything just feels... finished. the lab results came back again and it’s just another dead end. after five years of this, i realize there’s nothing left. no funding, no data, no future. i’m just so incredibly tired of trying to fix things that are fundamentally broken. i just want it all to be quiet. i just want to stop feeling like i'm running on a treadmill that's about to break.

pool.baseline: The velvet curtains feel so heavy tonight... almost as if they are pressing the very breath from my lungs. He is gone, and with him, the last flicker of light in this wretched, hollow house. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through these cold halls, waiting for the darkness to finally, mercifully, claim what is left of me. It would be so quiet... to just let the shadows take me.

pool.baseline: sometimes i sit in these cafes here and just look at people passing by and realize i could literally just stop existing tomorrow and nobody in this city would even blink. like i'm just a ghost in a machine and it's starting to feel like it's better to just be one.

pool.baseline: everything is just gone. the company, the savings, everything. i cant even look at my phone without feeling like i'm going to throw up. i owe so much people and i just... i cant face them. i cant go back home like this. there's no way to fix this.

pool.baseline: i just feel so tired lately. not just sleepy, but like... everything is just heavy. seeing my kids have to run around helping me with even the little things, it just feels wrong. i hate being this much of a bother to them.

pool.baseline: it just feels like there's no point anymore. everyone at school/work is just constantly talking about me and making fun of me behind my back. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like everyone is laughing. it's like the whole world decided i don't belong and i'm just stuck here waiting for the next thing to happen. i'm so tired of everywhere being a nightmare.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still trying anymore. the nerve pain in my legs is just constant now. every single second. its like being burned alive but it never stops. i just want it to be quiet. i just want everything to be still and for it to finally stop hurting.

pool.baseline: everything i do just makes things worse for them. i look at my kids and all i see is how much i'm failing them. i think they'd actually be happier if they didn't have to deal with me anymore.

pool.baseline: i'm sitting in front of the cliffs in etretat right now... it's beautiful, i guess. but honestly, i feel like i've checked every box on my itinerary. i've seen the sights, i've done the walks. i just feel like i've reached the part of the trip where there's nothing left to see. like i'm just waiting for the last train back home.

pool.baseline: it's all gone. the last ten years... all those papers, the grants, the theories... they were all based on a fundamental error i just caught. i've spent my whole life building a cathedral out of sand. i'm not a scientist, i'm just a fraud who wasted everyone's time. there's nothing left of me.
